title: Section 7F
content: 1[7F. Bar of legal proceedings.-- No suit or other legal proceeding shall lie against 2[the Central Government, the 3**** the Board], advisory panel or any officer or member of 4[the Central Government, the Tribunal, the Board or] advisory panel, as the case may be, in respect of anything which is in good faith done or intended to be done under this Act.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-6-1983). 2. Subs. by s. 17, ibid., for the Central Government, the Board (w.e.f. 1-6-1983). 3.The words the Tribunal omitted by Act 33 of 2021, s. 9 (w.e.f. 4-4-2021). 4. Subs. by s. 17, ibid., for the Central Government, Board or (w.e.f. 1-6-1983).
